name: Rum Cream Pie (Frozen Dessert)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: Roll de-sugared Oreo cookies and mix with melted butter. Press into two 9-inch pie plates and freeze.
2. For the filling: Beat egg yolks until well combined. Add sugar and beat until thick and creamy.
3. Soak gelatin in cold water, then place over a low flame and bring to a boil. Pour gelatin into egg mixture while stirring briskly.
4. Whip whipped cream until stiff and fold into the pie mixture. Stir in rum.
5. Pour filling into prepared pie shells, sprinkle with shaved chocolate, and freeze until firm.
Each pie serves 8.
